name: Waystation on the Moorland
excerpt: A disused highwayman's waystation where Dellan Moor and Sable Voss live.
notes: The waystation is located on the moorland north of the main coastal road, roughly two days' walk from the nearest town. It has a mostly intact roof, a fireplace, and a working well. Dellan Moor and Sable Voss have been living there for eight months, having stopped moving due to the waystation's adequacy and lack of a better plan. Dellan has been repairing the outbuildings.
